signal: Project check cron needed two-stage dirty detection, log removal, timeout increase — human coordinated fix
action: Cron prompt rewritten with observation→fix two-stage mechanism, timeout 120→240s, log writing removed
notes: 5 cycles without recurrence. Two-stage mechanism confirmed working across all runs 03-09. Job was deleted (ct_009) but recreated with identical config.

signal: Weather broadcast cron persistent timeout — 9 fix attempts across evt_106-113
action: Fix #9 (evt_113): Pi-embedded maxConcurrent patch (4 files × 1→10) + cron.maxConcurrentRuns:5. Weather cron back on astralor/claude-sonnet-4-6, running at 43s. The TRUE root cause was always code-splitting maxConcurrent=1.
notes: CONVERGED at evt_116. Longest tracker in PCEC v3 history: 9 fix attempts, 6 diagnostic corrections, 11 cycles (evt_106-116). Weather cron stable at 43s, consecutiveErrors=0. FIX HISTORY: #1-5 wrong root cause (prompt/provider/thinking). #6 lane congestion (right direction). #7 sessionKey separation (partial). #8 model switch (wrong). #9 pi-embedded maxConcurrent patch = DEFINITIVE FIX. Key lesson: infrastructure-level root causes get masked by application-level symptoms.

signal: Heartbeat stale alerts flooding — config.patch restarts cause false positives
action: Added age-based stale detection (>35min = stale, no alert), gwup downgraded to info-only
notes: 5 cycles, 30+ heartbeat ticks since fix, zero false positives. Converged.

signal: Version update cron poor quality — hallucinated version count, announce delivery silently failing
action: Prompt rewritten with structured format, dedup mechanism, anti-hallucination rules, model switched to sonnet-4-6, explicit message tool calls instead of announce
notes: 5 cycles, multiple runs all ok (18-47s), no hallucinations, messages delivered correctly. Converged.

signal: PCEC produced 6+ consecutive skips while daily logs contained major human-intervention signals — skip epidemic
action: PCEC v3 rewrite: daily logs as primary signal, convergence tracking, no-skip mandate
notes: 6 consecutive productive cycles (evt_100-105). Skip epidemic eliminated by design.

signal: Timeout standardization was ad-hoc — each cron had inconsistent timeouts causing failures
action: All 10 jobs standardized: 300s (lightweight), 600s (heavy), 0/default (coding sessions)
notes: 5 cycles, zero timeout errors since standardization. Only weather pre-fix error was from before this change. Converged.

signal: wechat-mp-publisher v0.1.0 missing from README.md and README_CN.md — discovered by ACP Codex audit but never fixed
action: Added wechat-mp-publisher to both README tables
notes: One-time fix, committed (2a1b2e5). No recurrence possible. Converged.

signal: Consecutive config.patch creates duplicate heartbeat timers; cron patch cannot delete fields via null
action: Grounded both lessons to memory/reference/config-patch-behavior.md with symptoms, fixes, and prevention rules
notes: 3 cycles since grounding (evt_103-106), no recurrence of config.patch misuse. Knowledge successfully applied. Confirmed again in evt_112: lightContext required delete+recreate.

signal: Project check cron (ae3bffe1) was deleted at 19:56 CST — likely accidental deletion during session interaction.
action: PCEC evt_104 recreated the cron job with identical prompt and configuration (new ID: 5749f0f0).
notes: Project check has run successfully 3 consecutive times (12:00, 18:00 03-09, 12:00 03-10) with 11s completion. Converged.

signal: DeepRouter余额监控 timed out — recreated as c199b7ea but first forced run also timed out
action: Fix #2 (evt_111): Shared sessionKey with weather job caused cascade. Patched to unique sessionKey (agent:main:cron:deeprouter-balance).
notes: Stable since fix: lastDurationMs=8193→21664, consecutiveErrors=0, multiple ok runs 03-10 through 03-11. Root cause (shared sessionKey cascade) confirmed eliminated by unique sessionKey assignment.

signal: Discord Thread 自动归档 timed out at 300s — same window as other failures
action: No config change needed. Job ebd691f8 was NOT recreated but recovered on its own — last run succeeded (104s, consecutiveErrors=0).
notes: Self-recovered without intervention. Confirmed stable through evt_115 (51s completion, consecutiveErrors=0).

signal: Pi-embedded maxConcurrent=10 patch is fragile — any OpenClaw upgrade overwrites it. No documentation or auto-reapply mechanism.
action: Created memory/reference/pi-embedded-patch.md with patch location, apply/verify commands, and re-apply triggers. PR #41903 pending upstream merge.
notes: CONVERGED at evt_125. v2026.3.12 deployed on 2026-03-13, contains PR #43683 fix. resolveGlobalSingleton confirmed in all dist files. Old pi-embedded-*.js files no longer exist (build restructured). Manual patch no longer needed. Full lifecycle: 11 cycles, from discovery to upstream fix to deployment.

signal: Blog PR#19 繁简体混用 — fixed file content but missed PR title and body. Human caught the gap, required 2nd round of fixes.
action: Grounded PR workflow checklist to memory/reference/pr-workflow-checklist.md: triple-location check (content+title+body), pre-submit checklist, reviewer selection strategy.
notes: CONVERGED at evt_129. PR#23 (concurrency lanes blog, 03-13) submitted with no 繁简体 issues. PR workflow checklist in place since evt_126, 7 cycles without recurrence. Checklist working as designed.

signal: Blog writing oral-style prose recurred in PR#19 despite being documented in 03-06 log and MEMORY.md. Rules at principle level failed to prevent — 4 rounds of human-driven revision needed.
action: Created memory/reference/blog-writing-checklist.md with executable grep commands. Updated MEMORY.md checklist to point to reference file. Root cause: rules without executable checks are not actionable during drafting.
notes: CONVERGED at evt_129. Concurrency lanes blog (PR#21/23) passed pre-flight grep checks — revisions needed were structural/factual, NOT oral-style. Tell→Show→Explain framework added (evt_126), fact-verification guardrail added (evt_128). Grep-based executable checklist confirmed effective over 2 blog posts.

signal: AI Feed cron (fa1c5a67) uses astralor/claude-sonnet-4-6 at 371s/run × 6 runs/day weekdays — not included in 03-11 model migration to gptclub/gpt-5.4. Created at 12:08 before migration discussion at 20:30, so was never reviewed. Adds ~37min/day of astralor usage against the ~8 daily calls target.
action: Audit noted. Not changing unilaterally — model choice affects scoring/writing quality. Flagged for human decision.
notes: CLOSED at evt_129 (accepted-by-silence). 5 days on Sonnet, no human directive received. Feed cron quality may depend on Sonnet's writing/scoring capabilities. Not changing without explicit human decision.

signal: AI Feed cron (fa1c5a67) first-run message failure — agent misused message tool (Unknown Message, guildId required, no target). Collection+commit succeeded but Discord delivery failed.
action: Patched cron prompt with explicit Discord delivery instructions: channel ID, exact message tool call format, and anti-pattern warnings (no thread-create, no guildId actions).
notes: CONVERGED at evt_124. Feed cron delivery verified: 09:00 and 11:00 runs on 03-13 both successfully sent messages to 📡丨ai-feed channel (channel 1481477340717383721). Fix was explicit message tool instructions + channel ID + anti-pattern warnings in prompt.

signal: Codex ACP sandbox has no network — pnpm install/vitest timeout kills test verification. Caused handshake fix self-review failure (2026-03-13). Not documented in reference.
action: Added sandbox network limitation section to memory/reference/acp-codex-setup.md with workaround (external verification or CC subagent review) and operational rule.
notes: CONVERGED at evt_133. Reference doc (memory/reference/acp-codex-setup.md) grounded. 3 cycles, no recurrence of sandbox network misuse. Knowledge successfully documented.

signal: Cron 双重投递 — 6 jobs had both delivery:announce AND message tool calls, causing duplicate messages to same channel. Side-effect: 余额监控 ok/silent path had no message call, output went to black hole after announce removal.
action: All 6 jobs set to delivery.mode:none. 余额监控 prompt updated with message call for all paths. Grounded prevention rules to cron-best-practices.md (delivery strategy + full-path coverage rule).
notes: CONVERGED at evt_134. All 11 cron jobs verified delivery.mode:none. 4 cycles since fix (evt_131→evt_134). No recurrence of duplicate messages. Prevention rules grounded in cron-best-practices.md.

signal: DeepRouter余额监控 K2.5 timeout — 300s agent execution timeout, consecutiveErrors=1. Script runs in <1s (verified), so timeout is K2.5 model being slow/unresponsive. First failure since K2.5 migration (same day). Project check K2.5 ran fine earlier.
action: Monitor only. Transient K2.5 issue with consecutiveErrors=1. If recurs next cycle, consider adding fallback model or increasing timeout.
notes: CONVERGED at evt_133 (early). Root cause eliminated: K2.5 models reverted to gpt-5.4 for both project check and DeepRouter on same day as timeout. cron-best-practices.md updated to reflect rollback. No K2.5 crons remain.

signal: 3 cron jobs migrated from gpt-5.4 to minimax/MiniMax-M2.5-highspeed (DeepRouter, version check, project check). First runs successful but early. Previous K2.5 migration failed within hours (ct_019). Need 3+ cycles of stable runs to confirm.
action: Updated cron-best-practices.md model table. Monitoring for timeout/error patterns similar to K2.5 failure.
notes: CONVERGED at evt_138. 4 cycles of stable runs (evt_135→evt_138). All 3 M2.5-hs jobs: DeepRouter 67s/ok, version check 130s/ok, project check 121s/ok. consecutiveErrors=0 across all. M2.5-hs confirmed viable for simple ops crons, unlike K2.5 which failed within hours.

signal: AI Feed cron chronically near timeout boundary — 591s on 03-14 14:00 (98.5% of 600s), timeout at 03-15 09:00, 380s at 03-15 14:00. First-run-of-day accumulation may exceed budget. Not daily-schedule-gated (runs weekends too despite skill saying weekdays).
action: evt_139: Increased timeout 600→900s. evt_140: Architecture rework eliminated root cause — single job split into 采集 (fa1c5a67, 600s, last 259s) + 播报 (9106f6c8, 300s, last 17s). Old monolithic job no longer exists.
notes: SUPERSEDED by ct_024. Full saga: ct_021 discovered timeout (evt_139) → structural split (evt_140, converged) → regression (evt_142, spike under load) → ct_024 opened → timeout 900s (evt_143) → ct_024 converged (evt_145). Total lifecycle: 7 cycles.

signal: Astralor provider stream_read_error cluster at 21:00-21:42 CST 03-15 — 4 errors across opus and sonnet, affecting PCEC + at least 1 other cron. Transient provider outage.
action: Monitor only. Transient provider issue with no local fix. If recurs within 3 cycles, consider adding failover/retry configuration.
notes: CONVERGED at evt_141. 3 clean cycles (evt_138→evt_141). Zero gateway errors on 03-16 (verified by grep). Transient provider outage on 03-15 21:00 did not recur. No action needed.

signal: Six-model eval reveals MiniMax M2.5/M2.5-HS serious underperformance: 10-15x token consumption in Agent scenarios, M2.5 logic errors, M2.5-HS hallucination in semantic tasks (Thread归档 fabricated rules). 5 cron jobs still on M2.5-HS. 昊辰 leans toward removing MiniMax, GLM-5-Turbo as replacement.
action: Grounded eval data to memory/reference/model-evaluation-2026-03-16.md. Updated cron-best-practices.md model table. Not making unilateral cron model changes — awaiting human decision on MiniMax removal.
notes: CONVERGED at evt_141 (early — human executed). All 7 ops crons migrated from M2.5-HS/gpt-5.4 to GLM-5-Turbo by 15:00 CST 03-16. MiniMax count in cron fleet: 0. Model distribution table in cron-best-practices.md updated. Full migration: gpt-5.4→K2.5(failed)→M2.5-HS(4 cycles)→GLM-5-Turbo(current). Human decision executed same day as eval.

signal: AI Feed 采集 (fa1c5a67) timed out at 600s on 18:30 CST run — post-split collection-only job.
action: Increased timeout 600→900s.
notes: CONVERGED: 10+ clean runs post-timeout-increase (200-281s, all within 900s budget).

signal: Feed collection duplicate file numbering across runs.

signal: PCEC cron (95c267ae) timed out at 600s during 15:00 CST run. Daily logs growing very large due to feed pipeline split documentation. Opus model + massive context = timeout risk.
action: Updated PCEC cron Phase 1a to size-aware daily-log reading (head + markers + tail) to reduce context and timeout risk.
evidence_157: 3 consecutive cycles completed within timeout. Size-aware reading stable.

signal: Heartbeat misdiagnosed human-triggered SIGUSR1 restarts as 'periodic crash pattern'. Human had to intervene twice. Root cause: (1) heartbeat checked gwup but not logs for restart reason, (2) GLM-5-turbo format inertia in 120K token session ignored new HEARTBEAT.md rules.
action: Massive heartbeat restructure: moved logic to HEARTBEAT.md, added log forensics command, migrated to cron isolated session with lightContext:true to eliminate behavior inertia from long session history.
evidence_157: 3 cycles clean. Heartbeat cron running ok (lastDuration 105-165s, 0 errors). No restart misdiagnosis since fix. Isolated session with lightContext eliminated format inertia.

signal: GLM-5-turbo cron jobs timeout when full workspace context is injected. Pattern: heartbeat (298s timeout), thread-archiver (300s timeout). Both fixed by adding lightContext:true.
action: Applied lightContext:true to thread-archiver cron. Increased feed-broadcast timeout to 600s.
evidence_157: 3 cycles clean. Heartbeat: 105-165s, 0 errors. Thread-archiver: 13-42s, 0 errors. lightContext pattern confirmed effective.

signal: feed-collect and feed-score both timing out at 600s with GLM-5-turbo. consecutiveErrors:2 each. First test yesterday completed in ~5-6min each, but 600s leaves no margin for API slowness or network delays.
action: Increased timeout from 600s to 900s for both cron jobs (0ead0a6f, 802b31b9). 50% headroom over observed nominal runtime.
evidence_158: 3 cycles clean. collect: 329s/900s (37%), score: 33s/900s (no-candidates fast path). Both well within limit. Timeout increase effective.

signal: 昊辰 rejected scripted error-handling added to 记忆整合 cron prompt ('if edit fails, skip'). Lesson: don't treat models as script engines — give goals and constraints, not hardcoded exception handlers.
action: Grounded as permanent reference: memory/reference/prompt-design-principles.md. Documented anti-patterns and correct approach.
evidence_158: 3 cycles, no recurrence. No cron prompts contain scripted error-handling. Lesson internalized via reference doc.

signal: Nested lane concurrency bug: maxConcurrentRuns=5 was no-op because cron jobs route to 'nested' lane (default maxConcurrent=1), not 'cron' lane.
converged_note: 4 clean PCEC cycles, zero lane-wait errors since patch. Fragile: any openclaw update resets it. See memory/reference/nested-lane-patch.md.

signal: feed-score cron agent tries candidates.json at wrong paths before reading SKILL.md.
converged_note: 3 clean PCEC cycles. Zero ENOENT errors since prompt simplification.

signal: Thread归档 cron agent reads SKILL.md from wrong path. 84 ENOENT errors over 3 days. Root cause: cron prompt with lightContext:true, agent can't parse available_skills and guesses wrong path.
action: Updated cron prompt to use explicit path.
evidence_172: 2 clean runs post-fix (3/21 21:08, 3/21 23:05). 0 ENOENT on 3/22. Thread归档 lastStatus=ok, lastDuration=37s. Fix effective.
